ARTICIE III.

This agreement shall come into force on the date on which the last of all such things shall have been done in each of the two countries as are necessary to give the agreement the force of lar in the Union of South Africa and in France respectively. This agreement shall thereupon have effect in respect of income and operations performed on or after the Ist January, I953.

ARTICIE IV.

This agreement shall continue in effect for an indefinite period. It may,

terminated by

ither Government by a written notification to the other

Government,

whereupon the agreement shall cease to have

effect from the 31st December Immediately following the expiration oi six months from the date of such written notification.
